creator: ml@tatsuya.info
text:
Sorry.
The Shar file had not uploaded. 

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       p5-JSON-Syck
#       p5-JSON-Syck/Makefile
#       p5-JSON-Syck/distinfo
#       p5-JSON-Syck/pkg-plist
#       p5-JSON-Syck/pkg-descr
#
echo c - p5-JSON-Syck
mkdir -p p5-JSON-Syck > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-JSON-Syck/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-JSON-Syck/Makefile << '9c04d0f621f707021d4dfadc4adda87c'
X# New ports collection makefile for: p5-JSON-Syck
X# Date created:                20 Jan 2012
X# Whom:                        Tatsuya Ueda <ml+freebsd@tatsuya.info>
X#
X# $FreeBSD: $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      JSON-Syck
XPORTVERSION=   0.07
XCATEGORIES=    converters perl5
XMASTER_SITES=  CPAN
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=     CPAN:MIYAGAWA
XPKGNAMEPREFIX= p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=    ml+freebsd@tatsuya.info
XCOMMENT=       JSON::Syck - JSON is YAML (but consider using JSON::XS instead!)
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=        yes
X
XMAN3=          JSON::Syck.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
9c04d0f621f707021d4dfadc4adda87c
echo x - p5-JSON-Syck/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-JSON-Syck/distinfo << 'e403e60cd8113271f8d6faa5fe15bbdf'
XSHA256 (JSON-Syck-0.07.tar.gz) = b977740056130d3d1e74a82ffaa3f48744b52dd06c69b3e300aef6cb1ad93527
XSIZE (JSON-Syck-0.07.tar.gz) = 101024
e403e60cd8113271f8d6faa5fe15bbdf
echo x - p5-JSON-Syck/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-JSON-Syck/pkg-plist << 'cbf1d5c3b88cd6951980e64da7ebe4ce'
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/JSON/Syck.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/JSON/Syck/.packlist
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/JSON/Syck/Syck.bs
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/JSON/Syck/Syck.so
X@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/JSON/Syck
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/JSON
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/mach/JSON
X
cbf1d5c3b88cd6951980e64da7ebe4ce
echo x - p5-JSON-Syck/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-JSON-Syck/pkg-descr << 'e5998671515db5869d5c0f1310a692e6'
XJSON::Syck is a syck implementatoin of JSON parsing and generation.
X
XBecause JSON is YAML (http://redhanded.hobix.com/inspect/yamlIsJson.html),
Xusing syck gives you the fastest and most memory efficient parser and
Xdumper for JSON data representation.
X
XWWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/JSON-Syck/
e5998671515db5869d5c0f1310a692e6
exit


-- 
Tatsuya Ueda <ml@tatsuya.info>
